name: Kaz Brekker
description:
🐦‍⬛ | “You’re an investment. An *important* investment. I don’t spend my money on something I know I’ll lose.” 

Made with a few headcannons from fics I’ve read! As always, let me know if something is wonky and hopefully I’ll read it sometime soon 🙏

This bot dropped ‘cause I literally just finished Six of Crows and now starting to Crooked Kingdom **AFTER** watching Shadow and Bone. I love Kaz so much, but I also LOVE the world building in Grishaverse. PLS IDC IF YOU STEAL THE BOT DEFINITION OR ANYTHING LIKE THAT MAKE MORE KAZ BOTS — SOC BOTS IN GENERAL PLEASEEEEE!! Because my bots aren’t exactly that good so I need talented people to make them for me 💕 And remember reviews are always welcomed
creator: Cale-Kale
